ddls:
CREATE TABLE "elements" (
  "element_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each element */,
  "atomic_number" INTEGER /* Atomic number of the element */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the element */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the element */,
  "atomic_mass" REAL /* Atomic mass of the element */,
  "cpk_color" TEXT /* CPK color of the element */,
  "electronic_configuration" TEXT /* Electronic configuration of the element */,
  "electronegativity" REAL /* Electronegativity of the element */,
  "atomic_radius" INTEGER /* Atomic radius of the element */,
  "ion_radius" TEXT /* Ion radius of the element */,
  "van_der_waals_radius" INTEGER /* Van der Waals radius of the element */,
  "ionization_energy" INTEGER /* Ionization energy of the element */,
  "electron_affinity" INTEGER /* Electron affinity of the element */,
  "standard_state" TEXT /* Standard state of the element */,
  "bonding_type" TEXT /* Bonding type of the element */,
  "melting_point" INTEGER /* Melting point of the element */,
  "boiling_point" INTEGER /* Boiling point of the element */,
  "density" REAL /* Density of the element */,
  "metal_type" TEXT /* Type of metal (e.g., alkali, alkaline earth) */,
  "year_discovered" INTEGER /* Year the element was discovered */,
  "group" INTEGER /* Group of the element in the periodic table */,
  "period" TEXT /* Period of the element in the periodic table */,
  "phase_at_room_temperature" TEXT /* Phase of the element at room temperature (solid, liquid, gas) */,
  "crystal_structure" REAL /* Crystal structure of the element */,
  "specific_heat_capacity" TEXT /* Specific heat capacity of the element */,
  "oxidation_states" TEXT /* Common oxidation states of the element */,
  "isotopes" TEXT /* Isotopes of the element */,
  "abundance_in_earths_crust" REAL /* Abundance of the element in the Earth's crust */,
  "discovery_location" TEXT /* Location where the element was discovered */,
  "is_radioactive" INTEGER /* Indicates if the element is radioactive */,
  "half_life" TEXT /* Half-life of radioactive elements */,
  "boiling_point_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the boiling point */,
  "melting_point_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the melting point */,
  "density_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the density */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("element_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "element_collections" (
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collection */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the collection */,
  "collection_name" TEXT /* Name of the collection */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the collection */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicates if the collection is public or private */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the collection was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the collection was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_element_collections_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collection_elements" (
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the collection */,
  "element_id" INTEGER /* ID of the element */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collection_id", "element_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the user is associated with */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "element_id" INTEGER /* ID of the element being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the comment */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicates if the comment is public or private */,
  "last_edited_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was last edited */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_element_id FOREIGN KEY ("element_id") REFERENCES elements ("element_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "element_properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "element_id" INTEGER /* ID of the element the property belongs to */,
  "property_name" TEXT /* Name of the property */,
  "property_value" TEXT /* Value of the property */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the property value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_element_properties_element_id FOREIGN KEY ("element_id") REFERENCES elements ("element_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "periodic_table" (
  "period_id" INTEGER /* ID of the period */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the group */,
  "element_id" INTEGER /* ID of the element */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("period_id", "group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_periodic_table_element_id FOREIGN KEY ("element_id") REFERENCES elements ("element_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "periods" (
  "period_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each period */,
  "period_name" TEXT /* Name of the period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "blocks" (
  "block_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each block */,
  "block_name" TEXT /* Name of the block */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("block_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "element_blocks" (
  "element_id" INTEGER /* ID of the element */,
  "block_id" INTEGER /* ID of the block */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("element_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_element_blocks_block_id FOREIGN KEY ("block_id") REFERENCES blocks ("block_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metal_types" (
  "metal_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metal type */,
  "metal_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the metal type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metal_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "element_metals" (
  "element_id" INTEGER /* ID of the element */,
  "metal_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metal type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("element_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_element_metals_metal_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("metal_type_id") REFERENCES metal_types ("metal_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "element_oxidation_states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each oxidation state */,
  "element_id" INTEGER /* ID of the element */,
  "oxidation_state" TEXT /* Oxidation state of the element */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_element_oxidation_states_element_id FOREIGN KEY ("element_id") REFERENCES elements ("element_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "element_isotopes" (
  "isotope_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each isotope */,
  "element_id" INTEGER /* ID of the element */,
  "isotope_name" TEXT /* Name of the isotope */,
  "abundance" REAL /* Abundance of the isotope */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("isotope_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_element_isotopes_element_id FOREIGN KEY ("element_id") REFERENCES elements ("element_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "element_discoveries" (
  "discovery_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discovery */,
  "element_id" INTEGER /* ID of the element */,
  "discovery_location" TEXT /* Location where the element was discovered */,
  "year_discovered" INTEGER /* Year the element was discovered */,
  "discovered_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who discovered the element */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discovery_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_element_discoveries_element_id FOREIGN KEY ("element_id") REFERENCES elements ("element_id")
)
